languages.text: "Кровь Сангвиния! Освободи меня, предатель!" {n}Астартес бьется в тщетной попытке разорвать оковы.{/n}
"Blood of Sanguinius! Release me, traitor!" {n}The Astartes thrashes in a futile attempt to break his shackles.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Кровь Сангвиния! Освободи меня, предатель!" {n}Астартес бьется в тщетной попытке разорвать оковы.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Por la sangre de Sanguinius! ¡Suéltame, traidor{mf||a}!». {n}El Astartes se debate en vano, tratando de zafarse de sus ataduras.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blood of Sanguinius! Release me, traitor!" {n}The Astartes thrashes in a futile attempt to break his shackles.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Por la sangre de Sanguinius! ¡Suéltame, traidor{mf||a}!». {n}El Astartes se debate en vano, tratando de zafarse de sus ataduras.{/n}

languages.text: “圣吉列斯之血在上！放开我，叛徒！”{n}那名阿斯塔特疯狂挣扎着，试图挣开镣铐，却是徒劳。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blood of Sanguinius! Release me, traitor!" {n}The Astartes thrashes in a futile attempt to break his shackles.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “圣吉列斯之血在上！放开我，叛徒！”{n}那名阿斯塔特疯狂挣扎着，试图挣开镣铐，却是徒劳。{/n}

languages.text: "Blut von Sanguinius! Befreit mich, {mf|Verräter|Verräterin}!" {n}Der Astartes versucht vergeblich, sich von seinen Fesseln zu befreien.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blood of Sanguinius! Release me, traitor!" {n}The Astartes thrashes in a futile attempt to break his shackles.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Blut von Sanguinius! Befreit mich, {mf|Verräter|Verräterin}!" {n}Der Astartes versucht vergeblich, sich von seinen Fesseln zu befreien.{/n}

languages.text: "Sanguinius'un kanı! Bırak beni hain!" {n}Astartes, prangalarını kırmak için boşuna çabalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Blood of Sanguinius! Release me, traitor!" {n}The Astartes thrashes in a futile attempt to break his shackles.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sanguinius'un kanı! Bırak beni hain!" {n}Astartes, prangalarını kırmak için boşuna çabalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Par le sang de Sanguinius ! Libérez-moi, espèce de traître ! » {n}Le membre de l'Astartes s'agite dans une tentative désespérée de se libérer de ses chaînes.{/n}
